senses.gloss: deep, strong love, affection and concord shown to someone or something

examples.text: وَقَالَ إِنَّمَا ٱتَّخَذْتُم مِّن دُونِ اللهِ أَوْثٰنًا مَّوَدَّةَ بَيْنِكُمْ فِي الحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا
examples.english: And [Abraham] said, "You have only taken, other than Allah, idols as [a bond of] affection among you in worldly life.

examples.text: وَمِنْ آيَاتِهِ أَنْ خَلَقَ لَكُم مِّنْ أَنْفُسِكُمْ أَزْوَاجًا لِتَسْكُنُوا إِلَيْهَا وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَكُم مَّوَدَّةً وَرَحْمَةً ۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
examples.english: And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquillity in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.

body.text: . (IAar, L, K.) Said to have the latter meaning in the Kur, lx. 1, in the first of the instances of its occurrence there: (L, K:) but this is a strange interpretation. (TA.)
